name: @nocobase/plugin-markdown
description: Provide Markdown blocks and collection fields powered by a pluggable Markdown engine, with Vditor as the default implementation.
description.ru-RU: Provides Markdown blocks and collection fields powered by a pluggable Markdown engine, with Vditor as the default implementation.
description.zh-CN: 提供 Markdown 区块和数据表字段，由可插拔 Markdown 引擎驱动，默认实现为 Vditor。
